name: Luxury Bath Towel
description: Soft premium cotton bath towel used in Oranto Hotel rooms. Highly absorbent, durable, and designed to provide guests with a luxurious spa-like experience.

name: Hotel Slippers
description: Comfortable indoor hotel slippers offered to Oranto Hotel guests. Lightweight, breathable, and perfect for relaxation inside the room.

description: Luxury aromatic soap set used in Oranto Hotel bathrooms. Crafted with skin-friendly ingredients to provide a refreshing and relaxing bathing experience.
